name: analitiq-plugins-official
description: Analitiq-managed official directory of Claude plugins for creating data integration connectors and pipelines

plugins.name: analitiq-connector-builder
plugins.description: Creates connectors and endpoints for the Analitiq DIP registry with support for API, database, and storage integrations

plugins.name: analitiq-pipeline-builder
plugins.description: AI-driven data integration pipelines using pre-defined connectors from the DIP registry
